text:
Created attachment 247358
sendmail error

Upgraded from 13.x to 14 RELEASE 

And got this error when doing make all restart in /etc/mail (see attached log file)



This issue is here at least since 14.0-RC3
https://groups.google.com/g/ml-freebsd-questions/c/3tk3Pjo-ELw

Tested a new generic install with freebsd14 in bhyve same issue.

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/upgrading-to-release-14-from-13.91161/#post-630331
